features.name: array element bit-select in posedge sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include a packed array whose element is used directly as the clock edge in a posedge sensitivity list, i.e. always @(posedge arr[i])

features.name: gated clock packed into array via concatenation
features.description: Code should include a packed wire array assigned via concatenation where one element is a gated clock (clock ANDed with an enable signal)

features.name: gated clock element in packed array used as posedge trigger
features.description: Code should include a gated clock stored as an element of a packed array, where that array element (via bit-select) is the posedge trigger of an always block, testing that gating is preserved through the array
